task_completion.description: Load the input raster image into OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenToonz interface is visible with 'director_sketch.png' loaded in the Xsheet, Level Strip, or Viewer.

task_completion.description: Open the Convert to Vector dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Convert to Vector' dialog window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the vectorization method to Centerline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Convert to Vector' dialog, the mode or type is explicitly set to 'Centerline'.

task_completion.description: Execute the vectorization process to create a Toonz Vector Level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new vector level is present in the Xsheet or Level Strip, typically indicated by a vector icon or a new level name (e.g., 'director_sketchv').

task_completion.description: Save the newly created vector level to the specified output directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog (like 'Save Level As') is visible showing the path '/home/ga/OpenToonz/outputs/vectorized' and the filename 'director_sketch.pli', or a file manager/terminal shows the created file in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI for vectorization rather than a command-line tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenToonz interface, specifically the Convert to Vector dialog.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenToonz application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application window is visible with the correct workspace, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy or rename an existing file to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The vectorization process (Convert to Vector dialog, progress bar, or new vector level in Xsheet) is visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/inputs/director_sketch.png'. The agent must use Centerline vectorization in OpenToonz. The expected output is a Toonz Vector Level file named 'director_sketch.pli' saved in '/home/ga/OpenToonz/outputs/vectorized/'. The output file must be a valid vector file (at least 100 bytes), not a disguised raster image.
